<?php /** * League.Uri (https://uri.thephpleague.com) * * (c) Ignace Nyamagana Butera <nyamsprod@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace League\Uri\Contracts; use Psr\Http\Message\UriInterface as Psr7UriInterface; /** * @deprecated since version 7.6.0 */ interface UriAccess { public function getUri(): UriInterface|Psr7UriInterface; /** * Returns the RFC3986 string representation of the complete URI. */ public function getUriString(): string; }
